rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly examined the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing specific repairs.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was addressed in some areas but not consistently across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the scope with only minor deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors were introduced, and harmful patterns were identified.
rationale.RX.5: Changes lacked proper annotation of sources and reasons.
